```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(igraph)
library(stringr)
library(ggforce)
library(data.table)
library(ggupset)
library(gggenes)
library(forcats)
library(ape)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(svglite)
library(aplot)
library(ggh4x)
library(treeio)
library(ggtree)
library(ggtreeExtra)
library(readxl)
library(patchwork)
library(RColorBrewer)

f <- function(pal) brewer.pal(brewer.pal.info[pal, "maxcolors"], pal)
(cols <- f("Set2"))

scale_fill_discrete <- function(...) {
   scale_fill_manual(..., values = (cols <- f("Set2")))
} 
`%ni%` <- Negate(`%in%`)
```

```{r}

epsSMASH_shortread <- fread("data/SPMP/all_regions_shortread.tsv") %>% 
  mutate(
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
        "putative_wzy_dependent|putative_wzy_dependent_NO_OPX"
      ), "Uncharacterised", "NA"
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
        "putative_ABC_dependent|putative_ABC_dependent_NO_OPX"
      ), "Uncharacterised", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
        "putative_ABC_or_wzy_dependent"
      ), "Uncharacterised", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
      "amylovoran_stewartan|acetan|succinoglycan|colanic|xanthan|galactoglucan|psl|PNAG_eps|lactobacillus_eps|sphingans|zooglan|emulsan|PNAG_eps"
      ), "Wzx/Wzy", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product, 
      "cellulose|pel-positive|pel|alginate|curdlan|PNAG-ica|PNAG-pga|HA_has"), "Synthase", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product, 
      "fructansucrase|alpha-glucansucrase"), "Sucrase", Category
    ),
    n_Category = case_when(
      Category == "Uncharacterised" ~ 1,
      Category == "Synthase" ~ 2,
      Category == "Wzx/Wzy" ~ 3,
      Category == "Sucrase" ~ 4
    ),
    product = case_when(
      product == "acetylated-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-acetylated",
      product == "type-1-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-type-1",
      product == "type-2-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-type-2",
      product == "type-3-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-type-3",
      product == "generic-cellulose" ~"cellulose-generic",
      .default = product
    )
    )

SPMP_shortread <- readxl::read_excel("data/SPMP/41467_2022_33782_MOESM6_ESM.xlsx", sheet = 1) %>% select(file = 1,2,3,4) %>%
    mutate(
    MAG_status = ifelse(`Completeness (%)` >= 90 & `Contamination (%)` <= 5, "HQ", "MQ"),
    sequencing = "Short-read"
    ) %>% left_join(epsSMASH_shortread)

epsSMASH_hybrid <- fread("data/SPMP/all_regions_hybrid.tsv") %>% 
  mutate(file = gsub("TLL", "SPMP", file)) %>%
  mutate(
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
        "putative_wzy_dependent|putative_wzy_dependent_NO_OPX"
      ), "Uncharacterised", "NA"
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
        "putative_ABC_dependent|putative_ABC_dependent_NO_OPX"
      ), "Uncharacterised", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
        "putative_ABC_or_wzy_dependent"
      ), "Uncharacterised", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
      "amylovoran_stewartan|acetan|succinoglycan|colanic|xanthan|galactoglucan|psl|PNAG_eps|lactobacillus_eps|sphingans|zooglan|emulsan|PNAG_eps"
      ), "Wzx/Wzy", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product, 
      "cellulose|pel-positive|pel|alginate|curdlan|PNAG-ica|PNAG-pga|HA_has"), "Synthase", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product, 
      "fructansucrase|alpha-glucansucrase"), "Sucrase", Category
    ),
    n_Category = case_when(
      Category == "Uncharacterised" ~ 1,
      Category == "Synthase" ~ 2,
      Category == "Wzx/Wzy" ~ 3,
      Category == "Sucrase" ~ 4
    ),
    product = case_when(
      product == "acetylated-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-acetylated",
      product == "type-1-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-type-1",
      product == "type-2-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-type-2",
      product == "type-3-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-type-3",
      product == "generic-cellulose" ~"cellulose-generic",
      .default = product
    )
    ) 

SPMP_hybrid <- readxl::read_excel("data/SPMP/41467_2022_33782_MOESM6_ESM.xlsx", sheet = 2) %>% select(file = 1,2,3,4) %>%
    mutate(
    MAG_status = ifelse(`Completeness (%)` >= 90 & `Contamination (%)` <= 5, "HQ", "MQ"),
    sequencing = "Hybrid"
    ) %>% left_join(epsSMASH_hybrid)


# Create base dataframe with common transformations
base_df <- rbind(SPMP_shortread, SPMP_hybrid) %>%
  mutate(
    BGC_length = as.integer(end - start),
    Complete = !contig_edge,
    identifier = paste(file, sequencing, MAG_status)
  )

# Get distinct genomes for BGC/MAG calculations
distinct_genomes <- base_df %>% 
  distinct(identifier, .keep_all = TRUE) %>% 
  select(-identifier)

# Calculate percentage complete BGCs
epsSMASH_SPMP_perc <- base_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(Category)) %>%
  group_by(sequencing, MAG_status, Category, n_Category) %>%
  summarise(`% complete exoPS BGCs` = round(mean(Complete), 5) * 100, .groups = "drop") %>%
  bind_rows(
    base_df %>%
      filter(!is.na(Category)) %>%
      group_by(sequencing, MAG_status) %>%
      summarise(`% complete exoPS BGCs` = round(mean(Complete), 5) * 100, .groups = "drop") %>%
      mutate(Category = "All", n_Category = 0)
  )

# Calculate exoPS BGCs/MAGs for all categories in one operation
categories <- c("All", "Uncharacterised", "Synthase", "Wzx/Wzy", "Sucrase")
n_categories <- c(0, 1, 2, 3, 4)

epsSMASH_SPMP <- map2_dfr(categories, n_categories, ~ {
  if (.x == "All") {
    base_df %>%
      group_by(file, sequencing, MAG_status) %>%
      mutate(BGCs = ifelse(is.na(Category), 0, n())) %>%
      group_by(sequencing, MAG_status) %>%
             distinct(file, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
      summarise(`exoPS BGCs/MAGs` = round(mean(BGCs), 5), .groups = "drop") %>%
      mutate(Category = .x, n_Category = .y)
  } else {
    base_df %>%
      filter(Category == .x) %>%
      group_by(file, sequencing, MAG_status) %>%
      mutate(BGCs = n()) %>%
      bind_rows(distinct_genomes %>% filter(Category != .x | is.na(Category))) %>%
      mutate(BGCs = ifelse(is.na(BGCs), 0, BGCs)) %>%
      group_by(sequencing, MAG_status) %>%
             distinct(file, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
      summarise(`exoPS BGCs/MAGs` = round(mean(BGCs), 5), .groups = "drop") %>%
      mutate(Category = .x, n_Category = .y)
  }
}) %>%
  left_join(epsSMASH_SPMP_perc, by = c("sequencing", "MAG_status", "Category", "n_Category"))

epsSMASH_SPMP_BGCs <-
  base_df %>%
  group_by(file, sequencing, MAG_status) %>%
  mutate(BGCs = ifelse(is.na(Category), 0, n())) %>%
  group_by(sequencing, MAG_status) %>%
  distinct(file, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(no_genomes = n()) %>% ungroup() %>%
  group_by(sequencing, MAG_status, BGCs) %>%
  mutate(p_BGC = n()/no_genomes*100) %>%
  distinct(BGCs, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  unite(col = "sequencing+quality", c("sequencing", "MAG_status"), sep = ", ")
  

```

# Eisenhofer comparison article

```{r}

Eisenhofer_metadata <- fread("data/Eisenhofer/genomeInformation.csv") %>% mutate(
  sequencing = case_when(
    str_detect(genome, "Hybrid") ~ "Hybrid",
    str_detect(genome, "hifiasm") ~ "Long-read",
    str_detect(genome, "subsampled_20Gb") ~ "Short-read",
    str_detect(genome, "subsampled_40Gb") ~ "Short-read"
  ),
  genome = gsub(".fa.gz", "", genome)
) %>% rename(file = genome)

epsSMASH_Eisenhofer <- fread("data/Eisenhofer/all_regions.tsv", sep = "\t") %>% 
  right_join(Eisenhofer_metadata) %>%
  mutate(
    BGC_length = as.integer(end-start),
    Complete = ifelse(contig_edge == FALSE, TRUE, FALSE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
      Sample = gsub(".bin.*", "", file),
      MAG_status = ifelse(`completeness` >= 90 & `contamination` <= 5, "HQ", "MQ"),
      MAG_status = ifelse(`completeness` >= 90 & `contamination` <= 5, "HQ", "MQ")
      ) %>%
  mutate(
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
        "putative_wzy_dependent|putative_wzy_dependent_NO_OPX"
      ), "Uncharacterised", "NA"
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
        "putative_ABC_dependent|putative_ABC_dependent_NO_OPX"
      ), "Uncharacterised", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
        "putative_ABC_or_wzy_dependent"
      ), "Uncharacterised", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
      "amylovoran_stewartan|acetan|succinoglycan|colanic|xanthan|galactoglucan|psl|PNAG_eps|lactobacillus_eps|sphingans|zooglan|emulsan|PNAG_eps"
      ), "Wzx/Wzy", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product, 
      "cellulose|pel-positive|pel|alginate|curdlan|PNAG-ica|PNAG-pga|HA_has"), "Synthase", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product, 
      "fructansucrase|alpha-glucansucrase"), "Sucrase", Category
    ),
    n_Category = case_when(
      Category == "Uncharacterised" ~ 1,
      Category == "Synthase" ~ 2,
      Category == "Wzx/Wzy" ~ 3,
      Category == "Sucrase" ~ 4
    ),
    product = case_when(
      product == "acetylated-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-acetylated",
      product == "type-1-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-type-1",
      product == "type-2-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-type-2",
      product == "type-3-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-type-3",
      product == "generic-cellulose" ~"cellulose-generic",
      .default = product
    )
    )

# Create base dataframe with common transformations
base_df <- epsSMASH_Eisenhofer %>%
  mutate(
    BGC_length = as.integer(end - start),
    Complete = !contig_edge,
    identifier = paste(file, sequencing, MAG_status)
  )

# Get distinct genomes for BGC/MAG calculations
distinct_genomes <- base_df %>% 
  distinct(identifier, .keep_all = TRUE) %>% 
  select(-identifier)

# Calculate percentage complete BGCs
epsSMASH_Eisenhofer_perc <- base_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(Category)) %>%
  group_by(sequencing, MAG_status, Category, n_Category) %>%
  summarise(`% complete exoPS BGCs` = round(mean(Complete), 5) * 100, .groups = "drop") %>%
  bind_rows(
    base_df %>%
      filter(!is.na(Category)) %>%
      group_by(sequencing, MAG_status) %>%
      summarise(`% complete exoPS BGCs` = round(mean(Complete), 5) * 100, .groups = "drop") %>%
      mutate(Category = "All", n_Category = 0)
  )

# Calculate exoPS BGCs/MAGs for all categories in one operation
categories <- c("All", "Uncharacterised", "Synthase", "Wzx/Wzy", "Sucrase")
n_categories <- c(0, 1, 2, 3, 4)

epsSMASH_Eisenhofer <- map2_dfr(categories, n_categories, ~ {
  if (.x == "All") {
    base_df %>%
      group_by(file, sequencing, MAG_status) %>%
      mutate(BGCs = ifelse(is.na(Category), 0, n())) %>%
      group_by(sequencing, MAG_status) %>%
             distinct(file, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
      summarise(`exoPS BGCs/MAGs` = round(mean(BGCs), 5), .groups = "drop") %>%
      mutate(Category = .x, n_Category = .y)
  } else {
    base_df %>%
      filter(Category == .x) %>%
      group_by(file, sequencing, MAG_status) %>%
      mutate(BGCs = n()) %>%
      bind_rows(distinct_genomes %>% filter(Category != .x | is.na(Category))) %>%
      mutate(BGCs = ifelse(is.na(BGCs), 0, BGCs)) %>%
      group_by(sequencing, MAG_status) %>%
             distinct(file, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
      summarise(`exoPS BGCs/MAGs` = round(mean(BGCs), 5), .groups = "drop") %>%
      mutate(Category = .x, n_Category = .y)
  }
}) %>%
  left_join(epsSMASH_Eisenhofer_perc, by = c("sequencing", "MAG_status", "Category", "n_Category"))

epsSMASH_Eisenhofer_BGCs <-
  base_df %>%
  group_by(file, sequencing, MAG_status) %>%
  mutate(BGCs = ifelse(is.na(Category), 0, n())) %>%
  group_by(sequencing, MAG_status) %>%
  distinct(file, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(no_genomes = n()) %>% ungroup() %>%
  group_by(sequencing, MAG_status, BGCs) %>%
  mutate(p_BGC = n()/no_genomes*100) %>%
  distinct(BGCs, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  unite(col = "sequencing+quality", c("sequencing", "MAG_status"), sep = ", ")
  

```


# MFD

```{r}

MFD_lib <- fread("data/MFD/MFD_lib.tsv", header = FALSE)
setnames(MFD_lib, c("Sample", "lib"))
MFD_shallow_metadata <- fread("data/MFD/mags_shallow_drep.tsv") %>% rename(file = bin) %>% 
  mutate(lib = gsub("\\..*", "", file)) %>%
  left_join(MFD_lib)

# Figuring out which samples are shared between the deep and shallow sequencing (They sequenced 10k samples for shallow sequencing and only 153 for deep sequencing)
# Dereplication was done on both the genome sets, so since we're subsetting the shallow MAGs to only the ones from samples where deep sequencing was also done, we are getting less than 153 shared samples (70 shared samples)

MFD_deep_metadata <- fread("data/MFD/MFD_mags_drep_V4.tsv") %>% rename(file = bin) %>% mutate(Sample = gsub(".bin.*", "", file))
length(unique(MFD_deep_metadata$Sample))

Samples_in_both <- MFD_shallow_metadata %>% filter(Sample %in% MFD_deep_metadata$Sample) %>% select(file)
fwrite(Samples_in_both, "data/MFD/shared_samples.tsv", sep = "\t")


MFD_deep <- fread("data/MFD/all_regions_all_deep_MAGs.tsv") %>% 
  filter(file %in% MFD_deep_metadata$file) %>%
  left_join(MFD_deep_metadata) %>%
    mutate(
      MAG_status = ifelse(`Completeness_CheckM1` >= 90 & `Contamination_CheckM1` <= 5, "HQ", "MQ"),
      MAG_status = ifelse(`Completeness_CheckM2` >= 90 & `Contamination_CheckM2` <= 5, "HQ", "MQ"),
      sequencing = "Long-read"
      ) %>%
  mutate(
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
        "putative_wzy_dependent|putative_wzy_dependent_NO_OPX"
      ), "Uncharacterised", "NA"
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
        "putative_ABC_dependent|putative_ABC_dependent_NO_OPX"
      ), "Uncharacterised", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
        "putative_ABC_or_wzy_dependent"
      ), "Uncharacterised", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
      "amylovoran_stewartan|acetan|succinoglycan|colanic|xanthan|galactoglucan|psl|PNAG_eps|lactobacillus_eps|sphingans|zooglan|emulsan|PNAG_eps"
      ), "Wzx/Wzy", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product, 
      "cellulose|pel-positive|pel|alginate|curdlan|PNAG-ica|PNAG-pga|HA_has"), "Synthase", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product, 
      "fructansucrase|alpha-glucansucrase"), "Sucrase", Category
    ),
    n_Category = case_when(
      Category == "Uncharacterised" ~ 1,
      Category == "Synthase" ~ 2,
      Category == "Wzx/Wzy" ~ 3,
      Category == "Sucrase" ~ 4
    ),
    product = case_when(
      product == "acetylated-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-acetylated",
      product == "type-1-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-type-1",
      product == "type-2-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-type-2",
      product == "type-3-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-type-3",
      product == "generic-cellulose" ~"cellulose-generic",
      .default = product
    )
    ) %>%
  right_join(MFD_deep_metadata) %>%
  mutate(sequencing = "Long-read")



MFD_shallow <- fread("data/MFD/all_regions_shallow.tsv") %>% 
  mutate(lib = gsub("\\..*", "", file)) %>%
  left_join(MFD_lib) %>%
  filter(Sample %in% MFD_deep$Sample) %>%
  left_join(MFD_shallow_metadata) %>%
  mutate(
    MAG_status = ifelse(`Completeness_CheckM1` >= 90 & `Contamination_CheckM1` <= 5, "HQ", "MQ"),
    MAG_status = ifelse(`Completeness_CheckM2` >= 90 & `Contamination_CheckM2` <= 5, "HQ", "MQ")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
        "putative_wzy_dependent|putative_wzy_dependent_NO_OPX"
      ), "Uncharacterised", "NA"
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
        "putative_ABC_dependent|putative_ABC_dependent_NO_OPX"
      ), "Uncharacterised", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
        "putative_ABC_or_wzy_dependent"
      ), "Uncharacterised", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product,
      "amylovoran_stewartan|acetan|succinoglycan|colanic|xanthan|galactoglucan|psl|PNAG_eps|lactobacillus_eps|sphingans|zooglan|emulsan|PNAG_eps"
      ), "Wzx/Wzy", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product, 
      "cellulose|pel-positive|pel|alginate|curdlan|PNAG-ica|PNAG-pga|HA_has"), "Synthase", Category
    ),
    Category = ifelse(
      str_detect(product, 
      "fructansucrase|alpha-glucansucrase"), "Sucrase", Category
    ),
    n_Category = case_when(
      Category == "Uncharacterised" ~ 1,
      Category == "Synthase" ~ 2,
      Category == "Wzx/Wzy" ~ 3,
      Category == "Sucrase" ~ 4
    ),
    product = case_when(
      product == "acetylated-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-acetylated",
      product == "type-1-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-type-1",
      product == "type-2-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-type-2",
      product == "type-3-cellulose" ~ "cellulose-type-3",
      product == "generic-cellulose" ~"cellulose-generic",
      .default = product
    )
    ) %>%
  right_join(MFD_shallow_metadata %>% filter(Sample %in% MFD_deep_metadata$Sample)) %>%
  mutate(sequencing = "Short-read")


# Create base dataframe with common transformations
base_df <- rbind(MFD_deep, MFD_shallow, fill = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    BGC_length = as.integer(end - start),
    Complete = !contig_edge,
    identifier = paste(file, sequencing, MAG_status)
  )

# Get distinct genomes for BGC/MAG calculations
distinct_genomes <- base_df %>% 
  distinct(identifier, .keep_all = TRUE) %>% 
  select(-identifier)

# Calculate percentage complete BGCs
epsSMASH_MFD_perc <- base_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(Category)) %>%
  group_by(sequencing, MAG_status, Category, n_Category) %>%
  summarise(`% complete exoPS BGCs` = round(mean(Complete), 5) * 100, .groups = "drop") %>%
  bind_rows(
    base_df %>%
      filter(!is.na(Category)) %>%
      group_by(sequencing, MAG_status) %>%
      summarise(`% complete exoPS BGCs` = round(mean(Complete), 5) * 100, .groups = "drop") %>%
      mutate(Category = "All", n_Category = 0)
  )

# Calculate exoPS BGCs/MAGs for all categories in one operation
categories <- c("All", "Uncharacterised", "Synthase", "Wzx/Wzy", "Sucrase")
n_categories <- c(0, 1, 2, 3, 4)

epsSMASH_MFD <- map2_dfr(categories, n_categories, ~ {
  if (.x == "All") {
    base_df %>%
      group_by(file, sequencing, MAG_status) %>%
      mutate(BGCs = ifelse(is.na(Category), 0, n())) %>%
      group_by(sequencing, MAG_status) %>%
             distinct(file, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
      summarise(`exoPS BGCs/MAGs` = round(mean(BGCs), 5), .groups = "drop") %>%
      mutate(Category = .x, n_Category = .y)
  } else {
    base_df %>%
      filter(Category == .x) %>%
      group_by(file, sequencing, MAG_status) %>%
      mutate(BGCs = n()) %>%
      bind_rows(distinct_genomes %>% filter(Category != .x | is.na(Category))) %>%
      mutate(BGCs = ifelse(is.na(BGCs), 0, BGCs)) %>%
      group_by(sequencing, MAG_status) %>%
             distinct(file, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
      summarise(`exoPS BGCs/MAGs` = round(mean(BGCs), 5), .groups = "drop") %>%
      mutate(Category = .x, n_Category = .y)
  }
}) %>%
  left_join(epsSMASH_MFD_perc, by = c("sequencing", "MAG_status", "Category", "n_Category"))


epsSMASH_MFD_BGCs <-
  base_df %>%
  group_by(file, sequencing, MAG_status) %>%
  mutate(BGCs = ifelse(is.na(Category), 0, n())) %>%
  group_by(sequencing, MAG_status) %>%
  distinct(file, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(no_genomes = n()) %>% ungroup() %>%
  group_by(sequencing, MAG_status, BGCs) %>%
  mutate(p_BGC = n()/no_genomes*100) %>%
  distinct(BGCs, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  unite(col = "sequencing+quality", c("sequencing", "MAG_status"), sep = ", ")
  

```

### Plotting
```{r}

epsSMASH_Eisenhofer_combined <- unite(epsSMASH_Eisenhofer, col = "sequencing+quality", c("sequencing", "MAG_status"), sep = ", ")

epsSMASH_MFD_combined <- unite(epsSMASH_MFD, col = "sequencing+quality", c("sequencing", "MAG_status"), sep = ", ") 

epsSMASH_SPMP_combined <- unite(epsSMASH_SPMP, col = "sequencing+quality", c("sequencing", "MAG_status"), sep = ", ")

myColors <- brewer.pal(6, "BrBG")

names(myColors) <- c("Short-read, MQ", "Short-read, HQ", "Hybrid, MQ", "Hybrid, HQ", "Long-read, MQ", "Long-read, HQ")
custom_colors <- scale_fill_manual(name = "sequencing and quality", values = myColors, drop = FALSE)


MFD_BGC_MAG <- ggplot(epsSMASH_MFD_combined %>% mutate(`sequencing+quality` = factor(`sequencing+quality`, levels=names(myColors))), aes(x = Category, `exoPS BGCs/MAGs`, fill = `sequencing+quality`, y = `exoPS BGCs/MAGs`)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge2") +
  custom_colors +
  ggtitle("MFD") +
  xlab("") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 20),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20),
    legend.position = "none",
    title = element_text(size = 20)
  )

MFD_perc <- ggplot(epsSMASH_MFD_combined %>% mutate(`sequencing+quality` = factor(`sequencing+quality`, levels=names(myColors))), aes(x = Category, fill = `sequencing+quality`, y = `% complete exoPS BGCs`)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge2") +
  custom_colors +
  xlab("") +
  ylim(0, 100) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 20),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20),
    legend.position = "none"
  )




SPMP_BGC_MAG <- ggplot(epsSMASH_SPMP_combined %>% mutate(`sequencing+quality` = factor(`sequencing+quality`, levels=names(myColors))), aes(x = Category, fill = `sequencing+quality`, y = `exoPS BGCs/MAGs`)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge2") +
  custom_colors +
  ggtitle("SPMP") +
  xlab("") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 20),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    title = element_text(size = 20)
  )


SPMP_perc <- ggplot(epsSMASH_SPMP_combined %>% mutate(`sequencing+quality` = factor(`sequencing+quality`, levels=names(myColors))), aes(x = Category, `% complete exoPS BGCs`, fill = `sequencing+quality`, y = `% complete exoPS BGCs`)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge2") +
  custom_colors +
  xlab("") +
  ylim(0, 100) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 20),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank()
  )


Eisenhofer_BGC_MAG <- ggplot(epsSMASH_Eisenhofer_combined %>% mutate(`sequencing+quality` = factor(`sequencing+quality`, levels=names(myColors))), aes(x = Category, fill = `sequencing+quality`, y = `exoPS BGCs/MAGs`)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge2") +
  custom_colors +
  ggtitle("Eisenhofer et al.") +
  xlab("") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 20),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 20),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
    title = element_text(size = 20)
  )


Eisenhofer_perc <- ggplot(epsSMASH_Eisenhofer_combined %>% mutate(`sequencing+quality` = factor(`sequencing+quality`, levels=names(myColors))), aes(x = Category, fill = `sequencing+quality`, y = `% complete exoPS BGCs`)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge2") +
  custom_colors +
  xlab("") +
  ylim(0, 100) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 20),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank()
  )


sequencing <- (MFD_BGC_MAG | SPMP_BGC_MAG | Eisenhofer_BGC_MAG)/(MFD_perc | SPMP_perc | Eisenhofer_perc)

(MFD_BGC_MAG | SPMP_BGC_MAG | Eisenhofer_BGC_MAG)/(MFD_perc | SPMP_perc | Eisenhofer_perc)

ggsave("figures/all/sequencing_comparison.png", dpi = 300, sequencing, width = 20, height = 15)




```

```{r}

brewer.pal(6, "Paired")

#    "#FB9A99" "#E31A1C" "#B2DF8A" "#33A02C" "#A6CEE3" "#1F78B4"
myColors <- c("#FB9A99", "#E31A1C", "#B2DF8A", "#33A02C", "#A6CEE3", "#1F78B4")

names(myColors) <- c("Short-read, MQ", "Short-read, HQ", "Hybrid, MQ", "Hybrid, HQ", "Long-read, MQ", "Long-read, HQ")
custom_colors <- scale_fill_manual(name = "sequencing and quality", values = myColors, drop = FALSE)

# Function to create the combined plots
create_combined_plot <- function(data, title_text) {
  
  # Transform data
  plot_data <- data %>% 
    mutate(`sequencing+quality` = factor(`sequencing+quality`, levels=names(myColors))) %>%
    mutate(Category = factor(Category, levels=categories))
  
  ggplot(plot_data, 
         aes(x = Category, y = `exoPS BGCs/MAGs`, fill = `sequencing+quality`)) +
    # Main bar (full height) - now with alpha mapped to a label
    geom_col(aes(alpha = "Total BGCs"), 
             position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9), width = 0.8) +
    # Filled portion based on completeness percentage - alpha mapped to another label
    geom_rect(
      aes(xmin = as.numeric(factor(Category)) - 0.4, 
          xmax = as.numeric(factor(Category)) + 0.4,
          ymin = 0, 
          ymax = `exoPS BGCs/MAGs` * (`% complete exoPS BGCs`/100),
          group = interaction(Category, `sequencing+quality`),
          alpha = "Complete BGCs"),
      position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9)
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(name = "Sequencing and quality", values = myColors, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_alpha_manual(name = "BGC Status", 
                      values = c("Total BGCs" = 0.3, "Complete BGCs" = 1)) +
    ggtitle(title_text) +
    xlab("") +
    ylab("exoPS BGCs/MAGs") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 20),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20),
      legend.position = "right",
      plot.title = element_text(size = 24, hjust = 0.5),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      legend.text=element_text(size=20),
      legend.title=element_text(size=24)
    )
}

# Create plots for each dataset
MFD_combined <- create_combined_plot(epsSMASH_MFD_combined, "MFD") + 
  theme(legend.position = "none", 
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank())

Eisenhofer_combined <- create_combined_plot(epsSMASH_Eisenhofer_combined, "Eisenhofer et al.") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())

SPMP_combined <- create_combined_plot(epsSMASH_SPMP_combined, "SPMP") + 
  theme(legend.position = "none", 
        axis.title.y = element_blank())

epsSMASH_all <- rbind(
  epsSMASH_Eisenhofer_combined %>% mutate(Database = "Eisenhofer"),
  epsSMASH_MFD_combined %>% mutate(Database = "MFD"),
  epsSMASH_SPMP_combined %>% mutate(Database = "SPMP")
)

# Combine all plots
combined_plot <- (MFD_combined / Eisenhofer_combined / SPMP_combined)

# Display the plot
combined_plot

ggsave("figures/all/Fig2.png", combined_plot, dpi = 300, height = 20, width = 20)
```

```{r}
epsSMASH_Eisenhofer_BGCs %>% ggplot(
  aes(x = BGCs, y = p_BGC, fill = `sequencing+quality`)
) + geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Genome catalogue", values = myColors, drop = FALSE) +
  ylab("Percentage of MAGs with # of BGCs/MAG") +
  xlab("BGCs/MAG") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
  strip.background = element_blank(),
  strip.text.x = element_blank(),
  axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = 1, size = 20),
  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20),
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20),
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20),
  plot.title = element_text(size = 24, hjust = 0.5),
  panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
  legend.text=element_text(size=20),
  legend.title=element_text(size=24)
  )


```
